uplink.description: soil telemetry: temperature 18.5 degC, VWC 42.3 %, EC 1.25 dS/m
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frames (measurementIds 4102/4103/4108) hand-built to the SenseCAP S210x wire format; expected values produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js on these bytes (measurementValue 18.5 / 42.3 / 1.25, already in natural units degC / % / dS/m).
Synthetic single 4102 frame with a negative raw value; expected -5.5 confirmed by running reference/upstream-codec.js (verifies signed two's-complement decode).

uplink.description: battery + interval control frame: 100% battery, 3600 s reporting interval
uplink._note: Synthetic dataId 7 (battery+interval) frame; expected values from running reference/upstream-codec.js (upload_battery 100, upload_interval 3600 s). Battery is a percentage, so it normalizes to the camelCase extra batteryPercent (vocabulary battery is volts).

uplink.description: length check failure: payload is not N*7 + 2 bytes
uplink._note: Synthetic malformed payload; upstream sets err -2 (length check fail) on the same input. Our codec surfaces this as an errors result per the output contract.
